report_note: slice=27b names the original baseline report format; generated_at, head_commit, and evidence summaries reflect the current checkout.

surfaces.description: npm run circuit:run entrypoint (`dogfood-run-0` dry-run invocation)
surfaces.expected_evidence: package.json scripts.circuit:run is a non-placeholder shell command (not echo/true/noop)
.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists, parses as object, declares non-empty name and version

surfaces.description: dogfood-run-0 workflow fixture loaded by `npm run circuit:run -- dogfood-run-0`
surfaces.expected_evidence: .claude-plugin/skills/dogfood-run-0/circuit.json parses as a non-empty JSON object
surfaces.evidence_summary: .claude-plugin/skills/dogfood-run-0/circuit.json parses as non-empty object (9 top-level keys)

surfaces.description: src/runtime/ module hosting the runner entrypoint(s)
surfaces.expected_evidence: src/runtime/ contains at least one .ts file with an `export` and >=40 non-comment non-whitespace characters
surfaces.evidence_summary: src/runtime/ contains 12 non-placeholder TS module(s): artifact-schemas.ts, config-loader.ts, event-log-reader.ts, event-writer.ts, manifest-snapshot-writer.ts, reducer.ts, result-writer.ts, router.ts, run-relative-path.ts, runner.ts, selection-resolver.ts, snapshot-writer.ts

surfaces.expected_evidence: src/runtime/event-writer.ts exists with >=40 non-comment non-whitespace characters and an `export` token. The writer surface is runtime code, not a data shape — the event-log DATA artifact is `run.log` at specs/artifacts.json.
surfaces.evidence_summary: event writer module at src/runtime/event-writer.ts (non-placeholder, exports content)

surfaces.expected_evidence: src/runtime/snapshot-writer.ts exists with >=40 non-comment non-whitespace characters and an `export` token. The writer surface is runtime code, not a data shape — the snapshot DATA artifact is `run.snapshot` at specs/artifacts.json.
surfaces.evidence_summary: snapshot writer module at src/runtime/snapshot-writer.ts (non-placeholder, exports content)

surfaces.expected_evidence: src/runtime/manifest-snapshot-writer.ts exists (>=40 non-comment chars, exports) AND specs/artifacts.json has a row whose id matches /manifest.?snapshot/ with a non-empty schema_file. Detection requires both the runtime module and the data-artifact row, because the byte-match gate is a runtime/data pair.
surfaces.evidence_summary: manifest snapshot writer module at src/runtime/manifest-snapshot-writer.ts (non-placeholder, exports content); artifact run.manifest_snapshot present; backing file(s): src/schemas/manifest.ts

surfaces.description: Runner smoke test exercising at least one dogfood step end-to-end
surfaces.expected_evidence: A tests/ file whose path matches /tests\/runner\/.*smoke\.test\.ts$/ or /tests\/.*runner[-_]smoke\.test\.ts$/ and contains an it/test/describe block
surfaces.evidence_summary: 3 test file(s) exercise runner smoke: tests/runner/agent-adapter-smoke.test.ts, tests/runner/codex-adapter-smoke.test.ts, tests/runner/dogfood-smoke.test.ts

surfaces.description: events.ndjson append → parse → reduce → derive state.json round-trip test
surfaces.expected_evidence: A tests/ file whose filename matches /event[-_]?log[-_]?round[-_]?trip\.test\.ts$/ and contains an it/test/describe block

surfaces.description: README.md / PROJECT_STATE.md / TIER.md current_slice markers present and in agreement
surfaces.expected_evidence: All three files carry a well-formed <!-- current_slice: <id> --> marker in the status-header zone, and the ids agree
